{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spirit-seals
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Spirit-seals are palm-sized rectangular sheets of paper featuring highly complex and profound [[scripts]]. These tools are primarily used to bind, manipulate, or weaken [[Remnants]], making them useful for tasks such as capture or dissection. While they are considered valuable assets that can provide a significant advantage in combat against spirits, their practical application is nearly impossible for anyone who is not a [[Soulsmith]]. They are often stored in stacks or packets and can be used to place seals on objects, such as jars, or applied directly to spirits to control them.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Spirit-seals]] are rectangular sheets of paper with complex [[scripts]] used to weaken [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] suggests the gear [[Yerin]] needs might be a [[Spirit-seals{{!}}spirit-seal]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have a stack of forty-eight [[Spirit-seals{{!}}spirit-seals]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] carries a stack of [[Spirit-seals{{!}}spirit-seals]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“I’m guessing the gear you need is a spirit-seal?”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
